{{CargoOrgan
|name=Bot-888
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10676
|idx=33
|description="Forged from nano-alloy, it stands as an impenetrable fortress, shielding the mechanical heart within from all incoming threats."
—Skynet Surveillance Log
|skill=Activate Robot Form, dealing DMG equal to 163% of ATK!
|hp=1150
|def=143
|atk=220
|rush=153
|gene1=For Round 1, DMG +5%
|gene2=RUSH CRIT DMG +5%
|gene3=When HP is below 30%, CRIT DMG +10%
|gene4=Break RES +2%
|gene7=RUSH CRIT DMG +5% (Awakened)
|}}
